events.title: Mega Mewtwo Raids - Global Make Up
events.description: 12 Free Raid Passes.  Super Mega Raids require Mega Evolved Pokemon, come prepared.

events.title: Gigantamax Rillaboom Max Battle Day
events.description: Recommended teams: Dynamax Blissey or Gigantamax Charizard as tanks. Gigantamax Charizard or Cinderace as attackers.
